action.reasoning: Observation: Training completed 3 epochs in ~27 min. Val F1=0.3262, train_acc=23%, val_acc=18.5%. The low accuracy is expected with class weights (prioritizing rare classes for macro-F1). The very high loss values (78.93 train, 146.73 val) suggest class weights may be too extreme. Analysis: Need to submit eval for baseline test score, then improve training. Key issues: class weights too aggressive (linear inverse frequency), only 3 epochs. Decision: Submit eval for current checkpoint to measure baseline + iteration time, then train longer with improved class weights (sqrt inverse frequency) and more epochs.
